title: Fix lab/feature color differentiation on clung.us

log.context: Fix lab/feature color differentiation on clung.us

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/hello-world/timeline.html`

The `--cat-labs` CSS variable was changed in both dark and light themes:
- Dark: `#10b981` (green) → `#f97316` (orange)
- Light: `#059669` (dark green) → `#ea6800` (dark orange)

Feature stays cyan (`#06b6d4`). The old green was too close to cyan — both sat in the blue-green band. Orange puts labs on a completely different part of the color wheel, making the two categories immediately distinguishable at a glance.
